page_text: Official Study in Sweden scholarship page for 2026/27. The technology scholarship application deadline was 15 January 2026. Late applications are not accepted.

rules.evidence_text: Official page states the 2026/27 scholarship cycle.

rules.requirement_text: Applicants from Sri Lanka are eligible.
rules.evidence_text: Official page includes Sri Lanka in the eligible country list.

rules.requirement_text: Application must be submitted by 15 January 2026.
rules.evidence_text: Official page says late applications are not accepted after 15 January 2026.
